query:
CREATE TABLE `omada_device_cache` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`omadaSiteId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`omadaDeviceId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`macAddress` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`deviceName` varchar(256),
	`deviceType` varchar(64),
	`deviceModel` varchar(128),
	`firmwareVersion` varchar(64),
	`status` varchar(32),
	`uptimeSeconds` int,
	`cpuPercent` int,
	`memPercent` int,
	`wanIp` varchar(64),
	`wanStatus` varchar(32),
	`serviceExternalId` varchar(64),
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `omada_device_cache_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `omada_device_unique` UNIQUE(`omadaSiteId`,`omadaDeviceId`)
);

CREATE TABLE `omada_sites` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`omadaSiteId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`omadaSiteName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`customerExternalId` varchar(64),
	`matchType` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unmatched',
	`matchConfidence` decimal(5,2),
	`siteRegion` varchar(128),
	`siteScenario` varchar(64),
	`wanIp` varchar(64),
	`wanStatus` varchar(32),
	`wanUptimeSeconds` int,
	`deviceCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`apCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`switchCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`gatewayCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`clientCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`healthScore` int,
	`healthStatus` varchar(32),
	`alertCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `omada_sites_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `omada_sites_omadaSiteId_unique` UNIQUE(`omadaSiteId`)
);

	`matchConfidence` decimal(5,2),
	`siteRegion` varchar(128),
	`siteScenario` varchar(64),
	`wanIp` varchar(64),
	`wanStatus` varchar(32),
	`wanUptimeSeconds` int,
	`deviceCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`apCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`switchCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`gatewayCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`clientCount` int DEFAULT 0,
